overview: Endocrine wellness clinic established in 2011 that creates personalized programs focused on hormonal balance and holistic health. Offers educational masterclasses on endocrine function, blood chemistry, and women's health.
highlights: Personalized programs tailored to individual needs
Educational content on hormones, blood chemistry, and women's health topics
targetAudience: Individuals interested in hormonal health and wellness, particularly women navigating perimenopause and hormonal transitions.
